ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "research_phase" TEXT /* Current phase of research for the compound */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Regulatory approval status of the compound */,
  "synthesis_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was synthesized */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the compound is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_lines" (
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "cell_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the cell line (e.g., patient-derived, commercial) */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment for the cell line (e.g., chemotherapy, targeted therapy) */,
  "cell_line_type" TEXT /* Type of cell line (e.g., primary, immortalized) */,
  "genetic_modification" TEXT /* Any genetic modifications made to the cell line */,
  "culture_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the cell line is cultured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compound used in the experiment */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell line tested in the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., in vitro, in vivo) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment in hours */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doses" (
  "dose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dose */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the dose */,
  "dose_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dose administered */,
  "dose_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the dose (e.g., mg, mL) */,
  "administration_method" TEXT /* Method of administering the dose (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  "time_of_administration" TEXT /* Time at which the dose was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the response */,
  "response_value" REAL /* Value of the response recorded during the experiment */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., viability, apoptosis) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the response (e.g., %, cells/mL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel (e.g., A2058) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel (e.g., fluorescence, luminescence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the protocol */,
  "protocol_description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol followed in the experiment */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol used */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who approved the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_protocols_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_protocols_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the experiments (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to (e.g., Oncology, Pharmacology) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result summary */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the experimental results */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the experimental outcomes */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of result validation (e.g., validated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the log */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who performed the action */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
